CVE-2022-22576.title: An improper authentication vulnerability exists in curl 7.33.0 to ...
CVE-2022-22576.description: An improper authentication vulnerability exists in curl 7.33.0 to and including 7.82.0 which might allow reuse OAUTH2-authenticated connections without properly making sure that the connection was authenticated with the same credentials as set for this transfer.

CVE-2020-8169.title: curl 7.62.0 through 7.70.0 is vulnerable to an information disclosure vulnerability
CVE-2020-8169.description: curl 7.62.0 through 7.70.0 is vulnerable to an information disclosure vulnerability that can lead to a partial password being leaked over the network.
